title: 简易日式麻将
description: This is a lightweight mahjong game designed for both enthusiasts and beginners of Japanese mahjong. The game features a clear 3D table display, supports various common game modes, and provides practical tips on winning hands and detailed scoring information to help players easily understand the game situation, learn the rules, and improve their skills. Whether you're a beginner to Japanese mahjong or want to practice anytime, you can enjoy a simple, direct, and ad-free mahjong experience against AI opponents.
description_short: This is a lightweight mahjong game designed for both enthusiasts and beginners of Japanese mahjong. The game features a clear 3D table display, supports various common game modes, and provides practical tips on winning hands and detailed scoring information.
